---
title: "Analysis of social media by gender in the BES 2017"
author: "Ruiyu Li"
date: "2026-03-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(readr)
options(scipen = 999)
getwd()
d_socialmedia <- read_csv('../data/BES-2017-f2f-gender-fb-tw.csv')
```

# Hypothesis
H1 Gender is associated with Facebook use

```{r}
chisq.test(
  d_socialmedia$Gender,
  d_socialmedia$Use_Facebook
)

```
# Findings
Gender is associated with Facebook use, X2(df = 1, n = 2189) = 18.046, p < .001.
